Method declares 6 parameters, exceeding the threshold.
Method repeats the same call to `takeOrder` twice.

Method delegates to `realMethod` without additional behavior.
Method accesses `this.chef.busy`, a private field of another class.
Updating contact info requires changes to multiple methods.
Updating name requires changes to multiple methods.

Updating phone number requires changes to multiple methods.
Updating email requires changes to multiple methods.

Method is empty and overrides inherited behavior with no implementation.
